# Chapter 10: Manufacturability, maintainability, sustainability, accessibility  (~90 pp)
- 10.1 Design for manufacture (12) · 10.2 Design for assembly (10) · 10.3 Design for maintenance (12) · 10.4 Design for inspection (10) · 10.5 Design for end-of-life (12) · 10.6 Sustainable design (15) · 10.7 Life-cycle analysis (10) · 10.8 Failure section: parts that could not be repaired, replaced, or recycled (9)

**Archetype**: ethics, scaling. **Project**: redesign one previous project for end-of-life; document the changes and trade-offs. **Exercises**: 20.
